calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-11-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-02-2025 Continued To Aug-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar May-14-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated October 30, 1997 and the codicil dated November 24, 1999 are admitted to probate. The San Francisco Public Administrator is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate remains set for June 2, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Amy Harrington remains as appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
